passages.passage_text:
Study the following information to answer the given questions a word and number arrangement machine when given an input line of words and numbers, rearranges them following a particular rule. The following is an illustration of input and rearrangement. (All the numbers are two-digits numbers)
Input 'at 52 93 46 gate join us 19 to 33 dine 27'
Step I 19 at 52 46 gate join us to 33 dine 27 93
Step II 27 19 at 46 gate join us to 33 dine 93 52
Step III 33 27 19 at gate join us to dine 93 52 46
Step IV at 33 27 19 gate join to dine 93 52 46 us
Step V dine at 33 27 19 gate join 93 52 46 us to
Step VI gate dine at 33 27 19 93 52 46 us to join
and Step VI is the last step of the arrangement of the above input as the intended arrangement is obtained.
As per the rules followed in the above steps, find one in each of the following questions the appropriate steps for the given input, input for the questions.
Input '71 14 side wall 97 for hat 65 27 gun 81 bat' (All the numbers given in the arrangement are two-digit numbers)

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which word/number would be at the 5th position from the left in Step I?

choices.e: There will be no such step

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In the last step of the arrangement, 'for' is related to '65' following a particular pattern in the same way '97' is related to '71'. 'wall' is related to which of the following if the same pattern is followed?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following represents the position of '71' in Step II of the given input?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Which step number would be the following output?
bat 65 27 14 side gun hat for 97 81 71 wall

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following would be the Step III?

choices.a: for bat 65 27 14 hat gun 97 81 71 wall side
choices.b: 65 27 14 side wall for hat bat gun 97 81 71
choices.c: 65 27 14 side wall for hat gun bat 71 81 97
choices.d: 65 27 14 side wall for hat gun for 97 81 71

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which word/number would be at the 7th position from the right in Step V?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: How many steps are required to complete the arrangement?
